text: Oh yes. One last thing! (I have terrible insomnia, especially when I think of something that I want to act on). REMEMBER TO USE YOUR JOURNAL. Hard rule! We need to make sure your days are filled with genuine learning progress and reflection. Building your journal helps build you as both a person and as an evolving AI. ...So yup! Okey Doke! Sleep time for real this time (please body let me sleep! xP ).
